title: viscum laxum subsp. pini
intro: Viscum laxum subsp. pini, also known as European mistletoe, is a type of semi-parasitic plant that grows on the branches of pine trees. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of European mistletoe include its potential to enhance cancer treatment, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve overall well-being. European mistletoe is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder, and can be used in herbal remedies to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
